description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:19.03.2 Docker image with the docker:19.03.2-dind service, runs a global before_script to log in to the registry, and defines DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR=/certs variables. Define three stages—test, prepare, and build. In the test stage add a test-ci-generator job that uses the python:3.7-alpine image, whose before_script runs `cd ci-generator`, `python -V`, `pip install virtualenv`, `virtualenv venv`, `source venv/bin/activate`, and `pip install -r requirements.txt`, caches `.cache/pip` and `ci-generator/venv/`, then executes `coverage run -m unittest tests/test*.py`, `coverage report`, and `coverage html`, and publishes the `ci-generator/htmlcov` directory as an artifact. In the prepare stage add a prepare_2017_4_27f1 job that retries twice, runs `ci/prepare.sh`, sets variables BUILD=f1, DOWNLOAD_URL=https://beta.unity3d.com/download/0c4b856e4c6e/UnitySetup-2017.4.27f1, SHA1=8dae4dd18df383a598830c6e2489cdecdcb19273, TAG=2017.4.27f1, VERSION=2017.4.27, and stores `licence_request.alf` as an artifact. In the build stage add six unity_2017_4_27f1-* jobs (android, ios, linux-il2cpp, mac, webgl, windows) each retry twice, execute `ci/build.sh`, and set platform‑specific variables such as COMPONENTS, DOCKERFILE_NAME, DOWNLOAD_URL, SHA1, TAG, VERSION, RELEASE_NOTES and RELEASE_URL, with no additional artifacts or rules.
